reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNUxMOUN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Demoran mucho, escaso personal para despachar, 1 hora para cargar estuvimos. Encima si venís por la ruta y te tiras a la derecha para entrar, te patotean los locales que hacen cola en una calle que está antes perpendicular a la ruta 12. Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
They take forever, there's hardly any staff to serve customers, and it took us an hour to load up. Plus, if you're coming from the highway and turn right to enter, you get bullied by the locals who are queuing up on a street that's perpendicular to Route 12. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMks2b0pBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es en las pocas que hay combustible, solo premium. Un punto importante, el  mercadito que tiene no es 24.hs, ojo por qué

(Translated by Google)
It's the few that have fuel, only premium. An important point: the small market isn't open 24 hours a day, so be careful.
